description: Observed counts at the coarsest level (level 1). Primary response used by the ordinary model and by the full multiscale model.
Observed child-level counts at level 2. For each (t, j), y_fine[t, j, ] sums to y_coarse[t, j]. Used in fitting for the full multiscale model (delta / omega block).
Known exposure or population offset at the coarsest level.
Continuous region-specific covariate following a smooth AR(1)-type trajectory over time.
Binary region-specific covariate, constant over time within each region in the current final DGP.
Raw residual risk state path on t = 1, …, TT before identified-space comparison.
Initial raw residual risk state at t = 0.
Beta innovation variables used in the Gamma-discount evolution of lambda_tilde.
Negative-binomial multiplicative random effect; conditionally iid Gamma with mean 1 given r.
Level-2 split proportions; each row over children lies on the simplex.
Fine-level Poisson probabilities or allocation shares derived from omega.
Effective offset excluding lambda_tilde and kappa: xi = e * exp(beta0 + x' beta + phi).
Full coarsest-level Poisson mean: mu = xi * lambda_tilde * kappa.
Identified-space version of lambda_tilde after re-centering; used for fair posterior recovery checks.
Identified-space initial residual risk state corresponding to lambda_tilde_ident.
Forward-filtering shape recursion values for the Gamma-discount latent state model.
Forward-filtering rate recursion values for the Gamma-discount latent state model.
Raw truth for the intercept used in data generation.
Truth for regression coefficients (beta1, beta2).
Raw coarsest-level spatial truth before identified-space re-centering.
Raw post-change spatial truth for changepoint scenarios; NA for no-changepoint scenarios.
Changepoint time used only in changepoint scenarios; NA otherwise.
Truth for ICAR precision.
Truth for negative-binomial size parameter. In scalar scenarios, one scalar value is expanded to length n1.
Truth for temporal discount factor. In the current DGP, scalar scenario values are expanded to a length-n1 vector.
Truth for Dirichlet discount factor.
Identified-space truth for the intercept after absorbing the global re-centering shift.
Identified-space spatial truth after absorbing region-specific re-centering shifts.
Identified-space post-change spatial truth for changepoint scenarios; NA otherwise.
Region-specific shift used to recenter log residual risk paths to the identified space.
Global shift absorbed into the identified intercept.
Number of time points.
Number of coarsest-level regions.
Number of children per coarsest-level region.
Indicator that generated fine-level counts aggregate exactly to the coarse-level counts.
Number of latent innovation draws clipped or stabilized near the boundary during DGP generation.
Number of latent state values floored to avoid numerical degeneracy during DGP generation.
Shared exposure or population offset used to generate paired datasets under the same inputs.
Shared continuous covariate used to generate paired datasets under the same inputs.
Shared binary, time-constant region-specific covariate used to generate paired datasets under the same inputs.
